query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `current_instructions_sync` (
  `id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `instructions_text` text NOT NULL,
  `synced_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `agent_note` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);
